message:
🐛 Fix insight enrichment retry spam and OPA cache TTL (#2104)

- Fix double /ws in WebSocket URL (ws://...8585/ws/ws → ws://...8585/ws)
- Add exponential backoff to WebSocket reconnect (5s→80s, max 5 attempts)
- Stop retrying HTTP enrichment after 404 (endpoint not implemented)
- Reduce OPA cache TTL from 60 min to 5 min for faster connectivity updates
- Show "Connection failed" instead of "Not installed" for unreachable clusters

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ import { PolicyDetailModal, ClusterOPAModal, CreatePolicyModal } from './opa' import type { Policy, GatekeeperStatus, OPAClusterItem } from './opa' import { useDemoMode } from '../../hooks/useDemoMode' -/** Cache TTL: 60 minutes — OPA installation status rarely changes */ -const CACHE_TTL_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000 +/** Cache TTL: 5 minutes — short enough to pick up connectivity changes */ +const CACHE_TTL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000 // Sort options for clusters type SortByOption = 'name' | 'violations' | 'policies' @@ -790,6 +790,11 @@ Let's start by discussing what kind of policy I need.`, )} + ) : status?.error ? ( +
+ + {status.error} +
) : (
